pokemon:bombirdier.name: Bombirdier
pokemon:bombirdier.summary: It gathers things up in an apron made from shed feathers added to the Pokémon’s chest feathers, then drops those things from high places for fun.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It gathers things up in an apron made from shed feathers added to the Pokémon’s chest feathers, then drops those things from high places for fun.
Bombirdier uses the apron on its chest to bundle up food, which it carries back to its nest. It enjoys dropping things that make loud noises.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It gathers things up in an apron made from shed feathers added to the Pokémon’s chest feathers, then drops those things from high places for fun.

form:bombirdier.name: Bombirdier
form:bombirdier.summary: Bombirdier form with Flying / Dark typing.
